name: Xavier Becerra
role: Secretary of Health and Human Services
bio: Xavier Becerra is an American politician and lawyer serving as the 25th United States Secretary of Health and Human Services.
_evidence: As the Secretary of HHS, he officially declared the 2022 mpox outbreak a public health emergency, centralizing the federal response.

name: Rochelle Walensky
role: Director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
bio: Rochelle Walensky is an American physician and scientist who served as the 19th director of the CDC from 2021 to 2023.
_evidence: She led the CDC's technical response, vaccination strategy, and public health messaging throughout the 2022 outbreak.

name: Robert Fenton
role: White House National Mpox Response Coordinator
bio: Robert Fenton is a career emergency management official who served as the regional administrator for FEMA before leading the national mpox response.
_evidence: Appointed to coordinate the interagency federal response, he was responsible for the operational execution of the vaccination campaign.
